description: The Walden! Bright and spacious 3 Bedroom+ Flex room / 2.5 bathrooms townhome by Woodbridge, built in 2018. Features include quartz countertops, a gas range, stainless steel appliances, a rare walk-in pantry, and an open-concept living. Durable Hardie/vinyl siding, electric heat, balcony, and 4+ parking (double garage + driveway + street). Family-friendly complex, walking distance to schools, transit, and shops with easy freeway access. Pets and rentals allowed (with restrictions). Sold as-is, where-is. Court approval required. The court date for the above property is March 5, 2026, at 9:45 a.m. at the Smythe Street Supreme Court in Vancouver.  Thanks,
